questions.content: 「book」的中文意思是？
「铅笔」对应的英文是？
「ruler」的意思是______。
「橡皮」对应的英文单词是______。
「书包」用英语怎么说？
「mother」的意思是？
「爷爷」对应的英文是？
questions.explanation: grandfather = 爷爷/外公（口语用 grandpa）。

questions.content: 下列哪个词表示「老师」？
「sister」是指______。
「叔叔/舅舅」对应的英文是？
questions.explanation: uncle = 叔叔、舅舅、伯伯、姑父等男性长辈。

questions.content: 「apple」是什么？
「milk」的中文是______。
下列哪个不是水果？
「面包」的英文是______。
「rice」的意思是？
「panda」的中文是？
「兔子」的英文是______。
下列哪个是海洋生物？
「dog」的中文是______。
「flower」的中文是？
「bus」是？
「医院」的英文是______。
「图书馆」对应的单词是？
questions.explanation: library = 图书馆，laboratory = 实验室。

questions.content: 「公园」的英文是______。
「飞机」的英文是？
「Monday」是星期几？
「twelve」对应的数字是______。
下列哪个月份是 12 月？
「nineteen」对应的数字是______。
「Friday」是星期几？
「red」表示什么颜色？
「圆形」的英文是______。
下列哪个不是颜色？
「sleep」的意思是______。
「读」的英文是？
「play」的中文是？

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-be动词
questions.content: I ___ a student.

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-be动词
questions.content: She ___ a teacher. (be 动词)
questions.explanation: she 是第三人称单数，用 is。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-be动词
questions.content: We ___ classmates. (be 动词)

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-be动词
questions.content: 下列填空正确的是：They ___ in the park.

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-be动词
questions.content: Mary ___ my friend. 用 be 动词填空。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-实义动词
questions.content: He ___ (like) apples.
questions.explanation: 第三人称单数 + 实义动词 + s/es。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-实义动词
questions.content: I ___ to school every day.
questions.explanation: I 后用动词原形 go。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-实义动词
questions.content: She ___ (watch) TV every night. (动词加正确形式)
questions.explanation: watch 以 ch 结尾，加 es。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-实义动词
questions.content: 下列动词第三人称单数变化错误的是？
questions.explanation: study 辅音字母 + y → studies，正确不是 studys。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-实义动词
questions.content: My brother ___ (play) basketball every Sunday.

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-实义动词
questions.content: 「他每天 6 点起床」对应：He ___ up at 6 every day. (get 形式)

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.content: 现在进行时的结构是？

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.content: She ___ a book now.
questions.explanation: now 提示进行时；she 单数用 is + V-ing。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.content: Look! The boys ___ football.
questions.explanation: Look! 提示进行时；boys 复数用 are。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.content: I ___ a letter at the moment.
questions.explanation: at the moment 进行时；I 后用 am + V-ing。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.content: 下列哪句是现在进行时？
options: A. He plays football every day.
B. He is playing football now.
D. He will play football tomorrow.
questions.explanation: B 用了 is + V-ing 结构。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.content: 动词 swim 的现在分词是______。
questions.explanation: 短元音 + 单辅音结尾，双写后加 ing。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.content: 动词 run 的现在分词是______。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.content: 「我每天看电视」对应英文是？
options: A. I watches TV every day.
B. I watch TV every day.
C. I am watching TV every day.
D. I watched TV every day.
questions.explanation: I 后用 watch 原形。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.content: 「他们正在唱歌」对应英文是？
questions.explanation: 现在进行时 are + V-ing；they 用 are。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.content: 「watch TV」的中文是______。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.content: I like apples. 改为否定句：I ___ apples.
questions.explanation: I 后用 don't + 动词原形。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.content: She is dancing. 否定形式是？
questions.explanation: 进行时否定 be + not + V-ing。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-be动词
questions.content: I ___ at school yesterday. (be 过去式)
questions.explanation: yesterday 提示过去时；I 用 was。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-be动词
questions.content: They ___ happy last week.
questions.explanation: they 复数 + last week 过去式 → were。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-be动词
questions.content: He ___ a doctor 10 years ago. (be 过去式)
questions.explanation: he 单数 + 过去 → was。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-be动词
questions.content: 下列哪句使用了 be 动词的过去式？
questions.explanation: were 是 are 的过去式。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: I ___ (go) to school yesterday.

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: She ___ (visit) Beijing last summer.

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: He ___ his homework yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 提示过去时，do 过去式 did。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: 动词 see 的过去式是______。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: 动词 study 的过去式是______。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: 下列动词过去式不规则的是？

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: 动词 buy 的过去式是______。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: 动词 stop 的过去式是______。
questions.explanation: 短元音 + 单辅音双写 + ed。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: 动词 take 的过去式是______。
She went to the park. 改为否定句是？
options: A. She didn't went to the park.
B. She didn't go to the park.
C. She doesn't go to the park.
D. She not went to the park.

questions.content: He ate an apple. 改为一般疑问句是？
options: A. Did he ate an apple?
B. Did he eat an apple?
C. Does he eat an apple?
D. Was he eat an apple?
questions.explanation: Did + 主语 + 动词原形。

questions.content: I was happy yesterday. 否定形式是？

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: I ___ (have) lunch at 12 yesterday.

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: We ___ (watch) a film last night.

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: 下列时间词不能用于过去时的是？

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: Tom ___ (write) a letter to his pen pal last weekend.

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: She ___ (come) to school by bus this morning.

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: 动词 read 的过去式是______（注意发音）。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: 动词 leave 的过去式是______。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: 动词 begin 的过去式是______。
She is a teacher. 一般疑问句是？
He likes English. 改为一般疑问句：______ he like English?
questions.explanation: 实义动词 + 第三人称单数 → does。

questions.content: I have a book. 改为一般疑问句：
对划线部分提问：He is in the park.（划线 in the park）
「你叫什么名字？」用英语问是？
对划线部分提问：She is 12 years old.（12）
对划线部分提问：He goes to school by bike.（by bike）
options: A. How does he go to school?
B. How do he go to school?
C. How does he goes to school?
questions.explanation: 对方式提问用 How，第三人称单数 does + 动词原形。

questions.content: He likes apples. 否定句是？
She has a cat. 否定句是？
options: A. She doesn't has a cat.
B. She doesn't have a cat.
C. She don't have a cat.
D. She isn't have a cat.

questions.content: There ___ a book on the desk.
There ___ four students in the room.
There ___ some milk in the bottle.
翻译：「桌子上有一些苹果」用 there be 结构正确的是？
options: A. There is some apples on the table.
B. There are some apples on the table.
C. There have some apples on the table.
D. There are some apple on the table.

questions.content: There is a pen and two books on the desk. 是否正确？
questions.explanation: there be 句型遵循「就近原则」，靠近 a pen 用 is。

questions.content: 陈述句最基本的结构是？
options: A. 主语 + 宾语 + 谓语
B. 谓语 + 主语 + 宾语
C. 主语 + 谓语 + 宾语
D. 宾语 + 谓语 + 主语
questions.explanation: 主谓宾是基本陈述句结构。

questions.content: 对时间提问用什么疑问词？
对原因提问用什么疑问词？
「他多大了？」对应：______ he?
questions.explanation: How old + be + 主语；he 用 is。

questions.content: 见到老师早上好，应该说？
「再见」最常用的英语是______。
questions.explanation: Goodbye 是常用告别语，口语也可 Bye。

questions.content: 下午问候说：
睡前道晚安说______。
自我介绍说「我叫小明」用英语是？
「你来自哪里？」用英语问是？
questions.explanation: Where are you from? 询问国籍/出生地。

questions.content: 「How old are you?」 答语是？
「这是我的妈妈」用英语说是？
questions.explanation: This is + 介绍对象（近距离）。

questions.content: 「请帮我」对应的礼貌表达是？
options: B. Could you help me, please?
questions.explanation: Could you ... please? 是礼貌请求。

questions.content: 「谢谢」最常用是 ______。
回答 Thank you 礼貌的方式是？
「对不起」用英语是______。
「我喜欢苹果」对应：I ___ apples.
「我最喜欢的颜色是蓝色」用英语是：My ___ is blue.
questions.explanation: favorite + 单数名词；favorite/favourite 都对。

questions.content: 回答「Do you like English?」可能的答语是：
questions.explanation: 实义动词 do/does 提问 → Yes, I do。

questions.content: 「我不喜欢苹果」用英语是？
options: D. I am not like apples.

questions.content: 「我们都喜欢音乐」对应：We ___ music.
questions.explanation: all 紧接主语，we 是复数，用动词原形 like。

questions.content: What's your favourite food? 可能的答语是？
options: B. My favourite food is rice.
questions.explanation: favourite food 问最喜欢的食物。

questions.content: 「Excuse me」常用于：
options: B. 唤起注意/打扰一下
questions.explanation: Excuse me 用于打扰前的礼貌前缀。

questions.content: 回答「Sorry」可以说：
options: A. It's OK / That's all right.

questions.content: 「你好吗？」用英语是 How ___ you?
「I'm fine, thank you. ___?」 表示反问对方
下列哪一句是告别语？
questions.explanation: See you (later/tomorrow) 是常用告别语。

questions.content:
阅读下面短文，回答问题：

My name is Lily. I am a student in Class Six. I get up at six thirty every morning. I have breakfast at seven. Then I go to school by bike. I have four lessons in the morning. After lunch, I have two more lessons. I go home at four in the afternoon. In the evening, I do my homework and watch TV.

问题：When does Lily get up?
questions.explanation: I get up at six thirty 即 6:30。

questions.content:
阅读下面短文，回答问题：

My name is Lily. I am a student in Class Six. I get up at six thirty every morning. I have breakfast at seven. Then I go to school by bike. I have four lessons in the morning. After lunch, I have two more lessons. I go home at four in the afternoon. In the evening, I do my homework and watch TV.

问题：How does Lily go to school?

阅读下面短文，回答问题：

My name is Lily. I am a student in Class Six. I get up at six thirty every morning. I have breakfast at seven. Then I go to school by bike. I have four lessons in the morning. After lunch, I have two more lessons. I go home at four in the afternoon. In the evening, I do my homework and watch TV.

问题：How many lessons does Lily have a day?

阅读下面短文，回答问题：

My name is Lily. I am a student in Class Six. I get up at six thirty every morning. I have breakfast at seven. Then I go to school by bike. I have four lessons in the morning. After lunch, I have two more lessons. I go home at four in the afternoon. In the evening, I do my homework and watch TV.

问题：What does Lily do in the evening?
options: C. She does homework and watches TV.
questions.explanation: 原文末句：do my homework and watch TV。

questions.content:
阅读下面短文，回答问题：

My name is Lily. I am a student in Class Six. I get up at six thirty every morning. I have breakfast at seven. Then I go to school by bike. I have four lessons in the morning. After lunch, I have two more lessons. I go home at four in the afternoon. In the evening, I do my homework and watch TV.

问题：Which class is Lily in?
questions.explanation: She is a student in Class Six。

questions.content:
阅读下面短文，回答问题：

Tom and Jack are good friends. They both like sports. Tom likes football, but Jack likes basketball. Every Saturday, they play games together. Sometimes they go swimming in summer. They are happy together.

问题：What does Tom like?

阅读下面短文，回答问题：

Tom and Jack are good friends. They both like sports. Tom likes football, but Jack likes basketball. Every Saturday, they play games together. Sometimes they go swimming in summer. They are happy together.

问题：When do they play games together?
questions.explanation: Every Saturday, they play games together。

questions.content:
阅读下面短文，回答问题：

Tom and Jack are good friends. They both like sports. Tom likes football, but Jack likes basketball. Every Saturday, they play games together. Sometimes they go swimming in summer. They are happy together.

问题：In summer, what do they sometimes do?
questions.explanation: Sometimes they go swimming in summer。

questions.content:
阅读下面短文，回答问题：

Tom and Jack are good friends. They both like sports. Tom likes football, but Jack likes basketball. Every Saturday, they play games together. Sometimes they go swimming in summer. They are happy together.

问题：「they are happy together」 means they are ___ together.

阅读下面短文，回答问题：

Last Sunday, my family went to the park. The weather was sunny. We had a picnic on the grass. My father took photos. My mother and I played games. My little brother slept under a tree. We had a great time.

问题：When did the family go to the park?

阅读下面短文，回答问题：

Last Sunday, my family went to the park. The weather was sunny. We had a picnic on the grass. My father took photos. My mother and I played games. My little brother slept under a tree. We had a great time.

问题：How was the weather?

阅读下面短文，回答问题：

Last Sunday, my family went to the park. The weather was sunny. We had a picnic on the grass. My father took photos. My mother and I played games. My little brother slept under a tree. We had a great time.

问题：What did the father do?

阅读下面短文，回答问题：

Last Sunday, my family went to the park. The weather was sunny. We had a picnic on the grass. My father took photos. My mother and I played games. My little brother slept under a tree. We had a great time.

问题：What is the main idea of the story?
options: A. The family had a happy day at the park.
questions.explanation: 全篇围绕一家人公园玩得开心。

questions.content:
阅读下面短文，回答问题：

Last Sunday, my family went to the park. The weather was sunny. We had a picnic on the grass. My father took photos. My mother and I played games. My little brother slept under a tree. We had a great time.

问题：「had a great time」 means they were ___.
questions.explanation: have a great time = 玩得开心。

questions.content:
阅读下面短文，回答问题：

Mr Brown is from England. Now he is in China. He teaches English at a middle school. He likes Chinese food, especially dumplings. On weekends, he often visits Chinese friends. He is learning Chinese. He says Chinese is interesting but a little difficult.

问题：Where is Mr Brown from?

阅读下面短文，回答问题：

Mr Brown is from England. Now he is in China. He teaches English at a middle school. He likes Chinese food, especially dumplings. On weekends, he often visits Chinese friends. He is learning Chinese. He says Chinese is interesting but a little difficult.

问题：What is Mr Brown's favorite Chinese food?
questions.explanation: He likes Chinese food, especially dumplings。

questions.content:
阅读下面短文，回答问题：

Mr Brown is from England. Now he is in China. He teaches English at a middle school. He likes Chinese food, especially dumplings. On weekends, he often visits Chinese friends. He is learning Chinese. He says Chinese is interesting but a little difficult.

问题：What does Mr Brown say about Chinese?
options: A. It is easy and boring.
B. It is interesting but a little difficult.
C. It is too hard to learn.
D. It is the same as English.
questions.explanation: 原文最后一句直接说明。

questions.content:
阅读下面短文，回答问题：

Mr Brown is from England. Now he is in China. He teaches English at a middle school. He likes Chinese food, especially dumplings. On weekends, he often visits Chinese friends. He is learning Chinese. He says Chinese is interesting but a little difficult.

问题：What is Mr Brown's job?
questions.explanation: He teaches English at a middle school。

questions.content:
阅读下面短文，回答问题：

Mr Brown is from England. Now he is in China. He teaches English at a middle school. He likes Chinese food, especially dumplings. On weekends, he often visits Chinese friends. He is learning Chinese. He says Chinese is interesting but a little difficult.

问题：What does Mr Brown do on weekends?
options: A. He goes back to England.
B. He often visits Chinese friends.
questions.explanation: On weekends, he often visits Chinese friends。

questions.content:
阅读下面短文，回答问题：

It is raining today. Lucy can't go out. She is reading a book at home. The book is about a brave boy. The boy travels to many places and helps people. Lucy likes the story very much. After reading, she will tell her brother the story.

问题：What is the weather like today?

阅读下面短文，回答问题：

It is raining today. Lucy can't go out. She is reading a book at home. The book is about a brave boy. The boy travels to many places and helps people. Lucy likes the story very much. After reading, she will tell her brother the story.

问题：What is Lucy doing?
options: B. She is reading a book.
questions.explanation: She is reading a book at home。

questions.content:
阅读下面短文，回答问题：

It is raining today. Lucy can't go out. She is reading a book at home. The book is about a brave boy. The boy travels to many places and helps people. Lucy likes the story very much. After reading, she will tell her brother the story.

问题：What is the book about?
questions.explanation: The book is about a brave boy。

questions.content:
阅读下面短文，回答问题：

It is raining today. Lucy can't go out. She is reading a book at home. The book is about a brave boy. The boy travels to many places and helps people. Lucy likes the story very much. After reading, she will tell her brother the story.

问题：「brave」 means ___.

阅读下面短文，回答问题：

It is raining today. Lucy can't go out. She is reading a book at home. The book is about a brave boy. The boy travels to many places and helps people. Lucy likes the story very much. After reading, she will tell her brother the story.

问题：What will Lucy do after reading?
options: A. She will go to bed.
B. She will tell her brother the story.
C. She will go out to play.
D. She will write a book.
questions.explanation: 原文最后一句：she will tell her brother the story。

questions.content: 「elephant」是什么动物？
「water」的中文是______。
How many ___ in your class?

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: Last week I ___ (visit) the museum.
下列结构正确的是？
options: A. He every day go to school.
B. He goes to school every day.
C. Every day go he to school.
D. He go every day to school.
questions.explanation: 主+谓+地点+时间是英语常见语序。

questions.content: 「homework」的中文是______。
「family」的中文是______。
Look at that boy! He ___ a kite.
There ___ many books in the library.
「school」的中文是______。
Whose book is this? 答语是？
questions.explanation: Whose 问归属，答 mine = my one。

questions.content: I am tired. 否定句是______。
「Sunday」是星期几？

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-be动词
questions.content: There ___ a big tree here ten years ago.
questions.explanation: ten years ago 过去时；a big tree 单数 → was。

questions.content: 「triangle」的意思是______。
「juice」的中文是______。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-实义动词
questions.content: 下列动词第三人称单数变化正确的是？
questions.explanation: wash 以 sh 结尾，加 es。

questions.content: 「friend」的中文是______。
Where do you live? 答语是？

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-实义动词
questions.content: He doesn't ___ vegetables.

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-实义动词
questions.content: 动词 fly 第三人称单数形式是______。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.content: 动词 sit 的现在分词是______。
questions.explanation: 短元音 + 单辅音双写 + ing。

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.content: He ___ a song now.

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.content: 对划线提问：He is reading.（划线 reading）
questions.explanation: 对正在做什么提问 What is ... doing?

questions.chapter: 一般现在时与现在进行时
questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般现在时-be动词
questions.content: 下列哪句正确？
options: A. Tom and I am students.
B. Tom and I are students.
C. Tom and I is students.
D. Tom and I be students.

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: 下列动词过去式正确的是？

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: 动词 think 的过去式是______。

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-实义动词
questions.content: 动词 sing 的过去式是______。
Did he ___ his homework?

questions.knowledge_point: 语法时态/一般过去时-be动词
questions.content: We ___ in the park yesterday afternoon.
questions.explanation: we 复数 + 过去时 → were。

questions.content: 下列语序正确的英语句子是？
options: A. I usually at 7 get up.
B. I usually get up at 7.
C. Usually I get at 7 up.
D. At 7 usually I get up.
questions.explanation: 频率副词 usually 在动词前。

questions.content: 对 He is at home 中 at home 提问：
对划线提问：The pen is red.（red）
options: C. What color is the pen?

questions.content: Tom can swim. 否定句是？
questions.explanation: 情态动词 can + not = can't。

questions.content: She speaks English well. 一般疑问句是？
options: A. Do she speak English well?
B. Does she speak English well?
C. Does she speaks English well?
D. She does speak English well?
questions.explanation: Does + 主语 + 动词原形。

questions.content: 「为什么」用什么疑问词？
There ___ five birds and a tree in the picture.
questions.explanation: 就近原则，靠近 five birds 用 are。

questions.content: 「他每天踢足球」翻译正确的是？
options: A. He play football every day.
B. He plays football every day.
C. He is playing football every day.
D. He played football every day.
questions.explanation: 第三人称单数 + plays + 时间状语 every day。

questions.content: There are some apples on the table. 改否定句：
options: A. There aren't some apples on the table.
B. There aren't any apples on the table.
C. There isn't any apples on the table.
D. There are not apples on the table.
questions.explanation: 否定句中 some 改 any。

questions.content: How much is the pen? 在问什么？
questions.explanation: How much 问价格（不可数也用）。

questions.content: 回答 Are you a student? 肯定回答是？
questions.explanation: Are you 答 Yes, I am / No, I'm not。

questions.content: 「请把书递给我」用礼貌英语是？
options: B. Could you pass me the book, please?
questions.explanation: Could you ... please 礼貌请求。

questions.content: 「这是谁？」用英语问是？
questions.explanation: Who 询问人；this 单数 + is。

questions.content: 「How is your mother?」 答语是？
questions.explanation: How 问状态/身体，答 fine/well。

questions.content: 「你最喜欢的运动是什么？」用英语是？
options: A. What sports do you like?
B. What is your favourite sport?
D. A 和 B 都对

questions.content: 回答 Would you like some tea? 礼貌的肯定答语是：
questions.explanation: Would you like 答 Yes, please。

questions.content: 「请安静」用英语是？
questions.explanation: 祈使句 + please 表请求。

questions.content: 下列哪句不能在见面时说？
questions.explanation: See you later 是告别用语。

questions.content: 深夜临别道别说______。
questions.explanation: 晚上离开/睡前 → Good night。

questions.content: How many people are there in your family? 在问______。
questions.explanation: How many people 问家庭人数。
